channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports

item.title: Utah HC defeats Boston in overtime, 2-1
item.description: SALT LAKE CITY (ABC4 Sports) - The Utah Hockey Club is showing a penchant for overtime in its first NHL season. Michael Kesserling scored at 2:46 of overtime to give the Utah Hockey Club a 2-1 victory over the Boston Bruins on Saturday night.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: USU gives up 21 points in fourth quarter, lose to New Mexico
item.description: LOGAN, Utah (ABC4 Sports) - Utah State's losing streak hit six games, and this one was the most hearbreaking. Devon Dampier and Eli Sanders had touchdown runs in the final 3:53 to rally New Mexico to a 50-45 victory over Utah State on Saturday.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: Cam Ward throws for 4 touchdowns, No. 6 Miami survives Louisville comeback bids for wild 52-45 win
item.description: LOUISVILLE, Ky. (AP) — Cam Ward's offensive line gave him plenty of time to throw on some big plays. On others, he created the extra time he needed to find his target on his own. The combination kept No. 6 Miami ahead and eventually created opportunities for teammates to win a shootout to remember.
item.dc:creator: GARY B. GRAVES, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: What to know before Stanford Cardinal kick off against No. 21 SMU Mustangs
item.description: Stanford has been outscored 120-28 in the past three games and now faces its third ranked opponent in four games.
item.dc:creator: Harold Gutmann, The Mercury News

item.title: No. 2 Oregon routs Purdue 35-0, remains on top of Big Ten with first road shutout in over 30 years
item.description: WEST LAFAYETTE, Ind. (AP) — Oregon coach Dan Lanning challenged his team to see how it would respond to a long road trip on a short week following its 32-31 victory over then-No. 2 Ohio State last week. The No. 2 Ducks aced that test Friday night.
item.dc:creator: MICHAEL MAROT, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Real Salt Lake aims for a strong finish to regular season while honoring midfield hero Matt Crooks
item.description: Real Salt Lake (3-West, 56 points) closes out the regular season against Vancouver Whitecaps FC (8-West, 47 points) at America First Field in Sandy on Saturday night.
item.dc:creator: Mattey Casey, ABC 4

item.title: Former NFL quarterback Jay Cutler arrested on DUI, gun charges
item.description: The former Bears and Broncos quarterback Jwas arrested Thursday in Tennessee for allegedly driving intoxicated.
item.dc:creator: Andy Koval, Fox 5

item.title: New renderings show how A's ballpark would transform Las Vegas Strip
item.description: Extensive details have been revealed about the proposed $1.5 billion "multi-purpose, enclosed ballpark" on the Las Vegas Strip that could become home to the Las Vegas Athletics MLB franchise in time for the 2028 baseball season.
item.dc:creator: Justin Walker, WGN 9

item.title: Bears hanging tough in an NFC North that's dominated the rest of the NFL so far
item.description: GREEN BAY, Wis. (AP) — Never in the past two decades has any division started out as strong as the NFC North has this season. With the undefeated Minnesota Vikings leading the way, all four NFC North teams are 4-2 or better.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, WGN 9

item.title: Lonzo Ball makes long-awaited return from knee injuries, scores 10 in Bulls' preseason game
item.description: CHICAGO (AP) — When the moment finally arrived, after multiple knee surgeries and one grueling rehab, Lonzo Ball raised his right arm and blew a kiss to the cheering United Center crowd. Fans rose to their feet as the announcement echoed through the arena: “Checking in for the Chicago Bulls! No.
item.dc:creator: ANDREW SELIGMAN, Associated Press, WGN 9

item.title: Illinois teen deemed ineligible for cross-country race after charity 5K
item.description: “I don’t really think there’s any reason that running a charity 5K should get me disqualified for running cross-country meets,” freshman Cole Deering said.
item.dc:creator: Jeff Bernthal, NewsNation

item.title: Jets acquire Raiders wide receiver Davante Adams, AP sources say
item.description: The New York Jets have agreed to terms to acquire disgruntled wide receiver Davante Adams from the Las Vegas Raiders, reuniting him with quarterback Aaron Rodgers, two people with knowledge of the deal told The Associated Press.
item.dc:creator: The Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: You can design L.A.’s official World Cup 2026 poster: Here’s how
item.description: Calling all Los Angeles County residents (over the age of 18) with artistic skills! The Los Angeles World Cup 2026 Host Committee announced Tuesday that they are searching for local artists and designers to be part of a “once-in-a-generation opportunity” to create the official regional poster for t
item.dc:creator: Will Conybeare, KTLA 5

item.title: Tampa Bay Lightning donates tickets to first responders; offers discounted tickets for first 3 home games
item.description: The Tampa Bay Lightning donated tickets to hundreds of first responders, other recovery workers, and their families following the aftermath of Hurricane Helene and Milton.
item.dc:creator: Ashley Suter, WFLA, NBC

item.title: Matt McCarty wins first PGA event at Black Desert Championship
item.description: IVINS, Utah (AP) - IVINS, Utah (AP) — Matt McCarty started the year on the Korn Ferry Tour and now is headed to the Masters, winning his first PGA Tour title Sunday at the Black Desert Championship with a 4-under 67 and one swing that all but sealed it.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: Royals keep playoff hopes alive with 3-0 win over Seattle
item.description: SANDY, Utah (ABC4 Sports) - In the second to last home game of the season, the Utah Royals kept their playoff hopes alive for another week, beating the Seattle Reign 3-0 off of a Cloe Lacasse hat trick.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: Shohei Ohtani stolen base streak ends at 36 in NLCS, caught for first time since July 22
item.description: LOS ANGELES (AP) — The Los Angeles Dodgers keep on winning in the playoffs, even without a bunch of home runs and stolen bases by Shohei Ohtani.
item.dc:creator: BETH HARRIS, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Breanna Stewart helps New York even WNBA Finals series as Liberty beat Lynx 80-66 in Game 2
item.description: NEW YORK (AP) — Breanna Stewart wasn't going to let history repeat itself. With the Minnesota Lynx making another fourth quarter run, the two-time league MVP refused to let the New York Liberty lose again.
item.dc:creator: DOUG FEINBERG, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Mayfield passes for 4 TDs as the Bucs treat storm-weary fans to a 51-27 win over the Saints
item.description: Baker Mayfield overcame three turnovers with 325 yards and four touchdowns passing, and the Tampa Bay Buccaneers defeated the New Orleans Saints 51-27 in what they hoped would be a morale boost to their many fans who endured Hurricane Milton.
item.dc:creator: BRETT MARTEL AP Sports Writer, WFLA, NBC

item.title: Mets add McNeil to NLCS roster while Dodgers drop Vesia and Rojas, add Kiermaier and Honeywell
item.description: Jeff McNeil was added to the New York Mets' roster for the NL Championship Series against the Los Angeles Dodgers after recovering from a broken right wrist. Right-handed reliever Adam Ottavino was dropped from the Mets' roster. Tommy Edman will start at shortstop throughout the NLCS, Roberts said.
item.dc:creator: BETH HARRIS, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Winners of the 2024 Bank of America Chicago Marathon
item.description: Runners from across the world gathered in Chicago Sunday for the 2024 Bank of America Chicago Marathon.
item.dc:creator: Ethan Illers, WGN 9

item.title: Ruth Chepngetich of Kenya smashes world record by nearly 2 minutes at Chicago Marathon
item.description: Ruth Chepngetich of Kenya smashed the world record by nearly two minutes at the Chicago Marathon on Sunday, winning in 2:09:56.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Bears dominate Jaguars in London, 35-16, to extend winning streak to 3 games going into bye week
item.description: The Bears capped off their London trip in style Sunday, routing the Jacksonville Jaguars, 35-16, at Tottenham Hotspur Stadium to extend their winning streak to three games and improve to 4-2 on the season.
item.dc:creator: Michael Johnson, WGN 9

item.title: North Carolina football player dies from rare lung cancer at 23
item.description: UNC had honored Tylee Craft, 23, during Saturday's game. Coach Mack Brown, however, said he hadn't learned of Craft's death until after the game.
item.dc:creator: The Associated Press, KTLA 5
